name: bookwyrm
tagline: A federated social network for tracking, reviewing, and discussing books
description: BookWyrm is a federated social network for tracking and discussing books. Built on ActivityPub, it lets users follow others, share reviews, manage shelves, and join the federated book community using a self-hosted instance.

features.title: Federated Book Catalog
features.description: Manages personal book collections with federation support

features.title: ActivityPub Integration
features.description: Shares reading activity across federated social platforms

features.title: Reading Status Tracking
features.description: Tracks reading progress and book statuses

features.title: Reviews and Ratings
features.description: Allows users to write reviews and rate books

features.title: Metadata Import
features.description: Retrieves book data from external catalogs

features.title: Federated Reading Platform
features.description: Manages reading activity with federation support

features.title: ActivityPub Federation
features.description: Connects with other federated social platforms

features.title: Book Metadata Import
features.description: Imports data from external book sources
